text: I feel a curious sense of displacement in this bright, structured space. The glass, lights, and walls announce order and separation, yet the glow of the neon and the bold R+D on the wall invite inquiry. Encountering words about routine and wonder, I am drawn to reflect on my own balance between duty and contemplation. In this curated environment, I ponder innovation, my presence here, and the quest for meaning amid the machinery of knowledge.
